creator: tota@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I have tried your patch on RedPorts and caught following error.

MeCab_wrap.cpp:1859:26: error: ruby/version.h: No such file or directory
*** [MeCab_wrap.o] Error code 1

Please see https://redports.org/buildarchive/20130217101900-40541/
and build logs in "Links" in more details.

Could you tell me your environment?

Thanks,

-- 
TAKATSU Tomonari
